label: cast104_00_c
source:
My best friend, who works as an assistant to
my father in his laboratory at the Imperial
Yumei University. She's the defendant in this
case.
text:
My best friend works in my
father's laboratory at Imperial
Yumei University. She's the
defendant in this case.

label: cast200_00_c
source:
The lead prosecutor of this case, who appears
to be struggling to accept the changes afoot
as a result of these turbulent new times in
Japan – the Meiji era.
text:
The lead prosecutor in this
case. He seems unsettled
by the turbulent changes
of Japan's new Meiji era.

label: item1_01_01_c
source:
Time of death just after 2 p.m. Death
is believed to be due to trauma to the
victim's lung from a knife blade. Only
a single wound was identified.
text:
Time of death: just after 2
p.m. A knife wound to the
lung was the cause. Only
one wound was identified.
